summary: Completed testing of new features: Personal Info (Más Datos) and Publish Expired Reviews endpoint. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements working correctly for the new 'Más Datos' tab and public profile display.

issues: Google Maps error due to API key domain restriction - known issue, not a code bug

backend_api_tests: GET /api/providers/my-profile/personal-info - returns saved personal info for carer
PUT /api/providers/my-profile/personal-info - saves all 8 allowed fields correctly
GET /api/providers/{provider_id} - includes personal_info field in response
GET /api/providers/{provider_id} - reviews still load correctly after refactoring
POST /api/reviews/publish-expired - returns correct structure with counts
POST /api/reviews/publish-expired - is idempotent (safe to call multiple times)
GET /api/reviews/client/me - works correctly for authenticated clients
frontend_ui_tests: Provider Dashboard shows 'Más Datos' tab in navigation
Más Datos tab displays personal info form with all fields (housing_type, has_yard, has_own_pets, animal_experience, daily_availability, additional_info)
Form saves successfully with toast message 'Información personal guardada'
Public provider profile shows 'Más Sobre el Cuidador' section with saved data
Personal info section displays: Vivienda, Patio/Jardín, Disponibilidad, Experiencia con Animales
Reviews section still displays correctly on public profile

seed_data_creation: Personal info data saved for provider prov_23ad24c36254 during frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 features tested and working: 1) Personal Info (Más Datos) - PUT/GET /api/providers/my-profile/personal-info endpoints work correctly, saving 8 fields (housing_type, has_yard, yard_description, has_own_pets, own_pets_description, animal_experience, daily_availability, additional_info). 2) GET /api/providers/{provider_id} includes personal_info field. 3) POST /api/reviews/publish-expired endpoint works correctly for cron job use. 4) Frontend 'Más Datos' tab in Provider Dashboard displays form and saves correctly. 5) Public provider profile shows 'Más Sobre el Cuidador' section with personal info when data exists.

personal_info_backend.PUT /api/providers/my-profile/personal-i: PASS - Saves all 8 allowed fields, ignores unknown fields
personal_info_backend.GET /api/providers/my-profile/personal-i: PASS - Returns saved data for providers only
personal_info_backend.GET /api/providers/{id}: PASS - Includes personal_info field in public profile response

publish_expired_reviews.POST /api/reviews/publish-expired: PASS - Returns message, provider_reviews_published count, client_reviews_published count
publish_expired_reviews.idempotent: PASS - Safe to call multiple times

regression_tests.GET /api/reviews/client/me: PASS - Still works after removing auto-publish logic from GET

frontend_mas_datos_tab.tab_visible: PASS - 'Más Datos' tab shows in Provider Dashboard navigation
frontend_mas_datos_tab.form_fields: PASS - All fields render correctly (housing type select, yard checkbox, pets checkbox, experience textarea, availability input, additional info textarea)
frontend_mas_datos_tab.save_functionality: PASS - Data saves with success toast
frontend_mas_datos_tab.data_persistence: PASS - Saved data displays on reload

frontend_public_profile.personal_info_section: PASS - 'Más Sobre el Cuidador' section displays when data exists
frontend_public_profile.fields_displayed: PASS - Shows Vivienda, Patio/Jardín, Disponibilidad, Experiencia con Animales

known_issues.google_maps: RefererNotAllowedMapError - API key needs domain authorization (not a code bug, external configuration)
